# Pulse HR

> Open-source, modular HR & payroll platform for teams of 5–500. Money, People and Work as three composable products sharing one workspace. Multi-country payroll (US, UK, IT, ES, FR, DE, IE, NL natively), keyboard-first command bar, webhooks on every event, PWA-ready. Source-available under FSL-1.1-MIT. Free for the first 5 employees.

## Overview
- [Product tour](https://pulsehr.com/product) — Three independent modules (Money, People, Work) sharing one workspace, one keyboard, one API.
- [Labs features](https://pulsehr.com/labs) — Team Pulse (sentiment), Commessa Forecast (scenario planning), Kudos (peer recognition), Focus Mode (deep work), Saturation (utilization).
- [Changelog](https://pulsehr.com/changelog) — Reverse-chronological product updates.
- [Pricing](https://pulsehr.com/pricing) — One transparent tier per active employee per month. Free up to 5 employees.
- [Security](https://pulsehr.com/security) — SOC 2 Type II, GDPR-compliant, EU data residency, ISO 27001 in progress.
- [API reference](https://pulsehr.com/docs/api) — REST API, webhooks on every resource, SDKs for TypeScript, Python, Go.
- [Source code](https://github.com/davide97g/workflows-people) — Public repository, FSL-1.1-MIT license.

## Principles
- **Open source** — Full source on GitHub under the Functional Source License (converts to MIT after 2 years). Read it, run it, fork it.
- **Modular** — Money, People and Work are three independent products. Adopt one, skip the others, swap later. No all-or-nothing migration.
- **Ecosystem-first** — Webhooks on every resource event, public REST API, first-class integrations with Slack, Google, QuickBooks, Okta, Stripe.
- **Keyboard-first** — ⌘K fuzzy search, ⌘J command bar, voice dictation, 40+ shortcuts. Every workflow reachable without a mouse.

## Command bar (⌘J)
⌘J opens a local intent parser. Type "log 4h on NOV-07 yesterday" or "approve Aisha's expense" and the parser maps it to a runnable action. No LLM call, no cross-tenant training, no network dependency — works fully offline on the PWA.

## Offline (PWA)
Installs as a PWA on macOS, Windows, iOS, Android. Recent views, timesheets and kudos drafts work offline and sync on reconnect. Payroll runs require a live connection and queue if offline.

## Contact
- Email: hello@pulsehr.com · sales@pulsehr.com
- Status: https://status.pulsehr.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/davide97g/workflows-people
